title: Guardian Expansion
description: A 1.20.1 mod that adds blocks, items, tools and armor themed around Guardians
body:
<center>

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17da551004bd4a015a05ac8bad15cea874835693.png)

</center>

Guardian Expansion is a 1.20.1 mod that adds blocks, items, and equipment themed around Guardians and Prismarine! Every addition in this mod features a crafting recipe, with some blocks needing to be created using a custom block. 

## Additions 

For more details on additions such as crafting recipes, check out the mods wiki page.

### Blocks
<details>
<summary>Click to Show</summary>

- Prismarine Converter
- Elder Prismarine
- Elder Prismarine Stairs
- Elder Prismarine Slab
- Elder Prismarine Wall
- Elder Prismarine Bricks
- Elder Prismarine Brick Stairs
- Elder Prismarine Brick Slab
- Elder Prismarine Brick Wall
- Elder Dark Prismarine
- Elder Dark Prismarine Stairs
- Elder Dark Prismarine Slab
- Elder Dark Prismarine Wall

</details>

### Items
<details>
<summary>Click to Show</summary>

- Prismarine Sword
- Prismarine Pickaxe
- Prismarine Axe
- Prismarine Shovel
- Prismarine Hoe
- Prismarine Helmet
- Prismarine Chestplate
- Prismarine Leggings
- Prismarine Boots
- Guardian Staff
- Guardian Helmet
- Guardian Chestplate
- Guardian Leggings
- Guardian Boots
- Elder Prismarine Shard
- Elder Guardian Staff
- Elder Guardian Helmet
- Elder Guardian Chestplate
- Elder Guardian Leggings
- Elder Guardian Boots
- Ocean Upgrade Template

</details>

## Modpack Usage

You are allowed to use this mod in your modpacks.
